display_text: Abaddon Aghanim's Scepter: Increases Borrowed Time duration and automatically casts Mist Coil on allies taking more than 550 damage within range. This is a potent anti-burst mechanic, enabling Abaddon to sustain allies during critical moments and counter high-damage spikes effectively.
search_text: Abaddon Aghanim Scepter anti-burst sustain automatic Mist Coil Borrowed Time duration

display_text: Abaddon Aghanim's Shard: 75% of absorbed damage from Aphotic Shield is dealt to nearby enemies. This transforms Abaddon into a counter-push specialist, punishing enemies for focusing shielded units and enhancing his teamfight presence.
search_text: Abaddon Aghanim Shard counter-push Aphotic Shield damage reflection teamfight
